main#report.report[0]>section#silhouette.zh: 性别 x 廓形 x 增长

main#report.report[0]>section#function-s.zh: 弹力与速干为半拉链核心功能底盘，双功能成主流，三功能加速爆发
main#report.report[0]>section#function-s.en: Stretchable & Quick-Dry are core, with 2-Func Mainstream and 3-Func Surge

main#report.report[0]>section#function-s.zh: 男女用户都不再满足单一功能，2项功能组合是当前需求主流，3项功能组合是最快升级方向；女性的多功能复合度相比男性略低。
main#report.report[0]>section#function-s.en: Both female and male expect multi-functions: 2 Func remain the base, 3 Func grow fast, while female show lower function complexity than male.

main#report.report[0]>section#function-s.zh: 女款对弹力+吸湿速干核心组合的需求更集中、增长更高，机会点在核心功能基础上延展到防晒/保暖/透气；男款机会点则在弹力+吸湿速干与轻量化或抑菌防臭的组合。
main#report.report[0]>section#function-s.en: Female show stronger, more focused demand for Stretchable + Quick-Dry, with opportunities in added Warmth / Sunscreen / Breathability. Male's key chances lie in Lightweight or Antibacterial added combos.

main#report.report[0]>section#function-s.zh: 男女性半拉链功能组合

面料 x 功能矩阵

main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.zh: 27FW半拉链内搭：增加布局，女款扩容
main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.en: Strategies for 27FW Half-Zip: Increase Depth, Expand Female Styles

main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.zh: 基础细节 + 高端升级
女性化剪裁、弧形下摆、弧形分割线、下摆抽绳等细节修饰身形。
main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.en: Feminine tailoring, curved hems, curved seaming and hem drawstrings, etc.

main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.zh: 女款半拉链应建立以修身感更强的主版型作为核心，再用常规版型补充增长，短款组合做小比例试验。
main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.en: Female half-zip should focus on Slim-Fit, then use Regular to support growth, try cropped length for small-scale test.

main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.zh: 60% 2功能组合：吸湿速干+弹力25% 3功能组合：吸湿速干+弹力+保暖/防晒/透气
main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.en: 60% 2-Func: Quick-Dry + Stretchable25% 3-Func: Quick-Dry + Stretchable + Warmth / Sunscreen / Breathable

main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.zh: 27FW 应把女款功能主轴从单一保暖升级为以弹力 + 速干为核心，并叠加保暖、透气或抑菌，强化女款的功能复合度。
main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.en: For 27FW, female should upgrade from single warmth to Stretch + Quick-Dry as the core, then add Warmth, Breathable or Antibacterial to strengthen function mix.

main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.zh: 男款半拉链的廓形升级重点，是在常规合体稳盘基础上，明显增加 Active 运动版型占比承接增量
main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.en: Keep Regular silhouette as the base for male half-zip, while increasing the share of fast-growing Active Fit.

main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.zh: 45% 2功能组合：吸湿速干+弹力/轻量30% 3功能组合：吸湿速干+弹力+抑菌/保暖/轻量15% 3+功能组合
main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.en: 45% 2-Func: Quick-Dry + Stretchable / Lightweight30% 3-Func: Quick-Dry + Stretchable + Antibacterial / Warmth / Lightweight; 15% 3+ Functions

main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.zh: 27FW 应在保暖基础上补入弹力、速干与抑菌等核心功能，建立“基础双功能 + 升级三功能”的男款功能梯度。
main#report.report[0]>section#product-di.en: Increase male function mix by adding Stretchable, Quick-Dry or Antibacterial beyond Warmth, building '2-Func basics and 3-Func upgrades' structure.
